summary: EXP-193 written. ISS-1217 (SEC-5.0.c1 hole #4, framing asymmetry) resolved by paragraph-level in-place patch to part5 > ks-april-2026-update. Original single paragraph ("The original rule was one of the strongest...opposite of what a falsification rule is supposed to do.") is replaced with two paragraphs that separate (1) credit for the new rule as an epistemic improvement from (2) the observation that, applied to the page, the strengthened rule concedes Sydney-Perth and Polaris in the direction of our review. Exact-match original provided as original_paragraph field; replacement as replacement_html. No other text touched. TLDR unchanged. Please close ISS-1217 on integration.
